description: Announcement from the educational committee about the morning and evening classes for the summer of 1953, and a chart naming the teachers and the children who will be studying and the meeting times – (number 108) – in Arabic. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa. ed. Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 30). MCD.
